search.placeholder: Search the whole platform: requests, opportunities, interviewers, skills...
search.voiceUnsupported: Voice search is not supported in your browser

auth.name: Name
auth.accountKindHint: Doesn't limit your roles — search, hire and offer expertise alike. Activate any role later from your account.
auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back! Sign in to continue your career journey
auth.registerSubtitle: Start your smart career journey today

roleSwitcher.requestTitle: Add a role to your account
roleSwitcher.requestHint: One profile, multiple roles — switch anytime.
roleSwitcher.seekerDesc: Find opportunities, apply, and build your resume and trust.
roleSwitcher.interviewerDesc: Evaluate candidates for a fee — the Certified badge boosts your ranking.
roleSwitcher.companyDesc: Post opportunities, receive applications, and hire top talent.
roleSwitcher.endorserDesc: Endorse colleagues and vouch for skills you witnessed firsthand.
roleSwitcher.coachDesc: Long-term career coaching: paths, resumes and soft skills.
roleSwitcher.trainerDesc: Intensive courses and workshops closing assessment gaps.
roleSwitcher.consultantDesc: Strategic consulting for companies on market and team design.
roleSwitcher.pendingNote: Your request is under review — the role activates on approval.
roleSwitcher.extraRolesHint: You can activate more roles now or later from your account menu.

dashboard.aiGreeting: You have {opportunities} new matching opportunities, {wishes} incoming wishes, and {endorsements} received endorsements.

discovery.noResultsHint: Try widening the filters or adjusting your search

opportunities.title: Browse opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: AI-recommended opportunities based on your profile
opportunities.search: Search by title, company, or skill…
opportunities.topBanner: Best match for your profile: “{title}” — {company} · {rate}% match

requests.title: Requests marketplace
requests.subtitle: Jobs, projects, consultations and tasks — smartly ranked by your match
requests.search: Search: Vue projects, architecture consulting, short task…
requests.topBanner: Recommended for you: “{title}” from {org} — {rate}% match with your profile.

interviewers.title: Certified interviewers marketplace
interviewers.subtitle: Certified experts run documented assessment interviews that boost your confidence score
interviewers.search: Search interviewers by name or specialty…
interviewers.tiersModalDesc: Interviewers are promoted automatically between tiers as their completed interviews and ratings grow.
interviewers.reschedIntro: The AI suggested alternative times based on your preferences and the interviewer's availability — pick one:
interviewers.reschedDone: Interview rescheduled — the new time was sent to the interviewer for confirmation.

experts.title: Experts marketplace
experts.subtitle: Discover certified mentors, trainers and consultants and request their service directly
experts.joinBanner: Have mentoring, training or consulting experience? Join the marketplace and turn your expertise into income.
experts.describeGoal: Describe your goal for the service
experts.describeGoalPlaceholder: Example: I want a transition plan from IT support to front-end development within 6 months
experts.requestHelp: Your request reaches the expert via “Peer requests” and you follow their reply there.
experts.requestSent: Your request was sent — follow up in peer requests.
experts.notifTitle: Your request was sent to the expert
experts.notifBody: {service} from {name} — follow the reply in peer requests.

people.title: Explore people
people.subtitle: Meet the platform's community — experts, seekers and organizations, each with a verified public page
people.search: Search by name, specialty, or skill…
people.ctaBanner: These are their pages — where's yours? Strengthen and share it so opportunities find you here.
people.demoNote: Demo profile for display — full member pages activate with the backend connection.

portal.title: Discover
portal.subtitle: Search and explore across all markets together — opportunities, requests, people, experts and interviewers.
portal.search: Search the whole platform: title, person, company, skill…
portal.noResultsFor: No results for “{query}”. Try different keywords.
portal.startHint: Type in the search bar above to start.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: The platform pulse at a glance

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage accounts, roles and permissions
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or ID...
users.confirmSuspendMsg: {name} won't be able to sign in until reactivated.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Console role permission matrix
roles.superAdminNote: Super admin always holds all permissions.
roles.noMembers: No members in this role yet.
roles.revokeMsg: The "{role}" role will be revoked from {name}.
roles.confirmDeleteMsg: Role "{name}" will be removed (blocked for system or populated roles).

opportunities.title: Opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: Moderate posted opportunities
opportunities.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, company or location...

wallets.title: Wallets
wallets.subtitle: Financial control — view and adjust balances
wallets.searchPlaceholder: Search by owner name or email...

interviewers.title: Interviewers
interviewers.subtitle: Accreditation governance — approve or reject interviewer applications
interviewers.confirmRejectMsg: "{name}" will be hidden from the public marketplace.

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Plan catalog — pricing, features and limits
plans.searchPlaceholder: Search by plan name or key...
plans.confirmDeleteMsg: "{name}" will be permanently removed (blocked if it has subscribers).

treasury.title: Platform treasury
treasury.subtitle: Bank accounts and revenue ledger
treasury.confirmDeleteMsg: "{name}" will be removed (blocked for default or with balance/history).

iquality.title: Interview Quality
iquality.subtitle: Weighted rubrics + integrity signals + per-track bias calibration

compliance.title: Fairness & Compliance
compliance.subtitle: Adverse impact (four-fifths rule) + representation + AI decision oversight
compliance.verdictFlag: Alert: {count} group(s) below the four-fifths threshold
compliance.fourFifths: Four-fifths rule: a group's selection rate ÷ the highest rate must be at least 0.8.
compliance.adverseNote: The highest group is the reference (ratio 1.0); below 0.8 is flagged as adverse impact (small samples excluded).

templates.title: Survey templates
templates.subtitle: Library of ready templates, types and patterns
templates.noQuestions: No questions yet — add from the types below
templates.confirmDeleteMsg: "{name}" will be removed (system templates are protected).

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Track every admin action on the platform

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.subtitle: Central control of platform options — grouped and typed
settings.note: Some settings govern real behavior (signup toggle, welcome balance).

billing.title: Billing & subscriptions
billing.subtitle: Plan-upgrade invoices, revenue and refunds
billing.confirmRefundMsg: {amount} SAR will be returned to the user wallet and debited from treasury ({ref}).

governance.title: Governance & moderation
governance.subtitle: Expert/skill approvals and content reports queue

broadcast.title: Broadcast & notifications
broadcast.subtitle: Send targeted announcements and notifications to users

support.title: Support tickets
support.subtitle: Manage and respond to user tickets

ai.title: AI Governance
ai.subtitle: Configure the platform AI assistant: provider, quotas, sections and knowledge base
ai.masterOff: Disabled — no AI section is active
ai.keyNote: This provider's key is managed on the server via the {env} environment variable (not stored here).
ai.level1Hint: A precise direct answer, no elaboration
ai.level3Hint: Deep analysis + risks & opportunities + steps + follow-up
ai.overrideOn: Subscribers may pick their own level
ai.simNote: Simulation mode — no real provider is called.
ai.sectionsDesc: Turn AI on or off for each platform feature individually.
ai.masterOffNote: Master switch is off — sections are disabled until it is enabled.
ai.quotaDesc: Token consumption limits per plan (0 = unlimited).
ai.docReadsHint: Max documents the assistant reads in a single request.
ai.quotaZeroNote: A value of 0 means unlimited for that period.
ai.knowledgeDesc: Context snippets the assistant relies on (policies, tone, fixed facts).

chat.title: Chat Oversight
chat.subtitle: Govern messaging and the AI assistant, and monitor platform conversations
chat.aiCardHint: Assistant status is governed by the AI module — disabling any gate stops the in-chat assistant.
chat.swDirectHint: Disabling this blocks user-to-user messaging immediately
chat.swAssistantHint: Offer the AI assistant to users (integrated with AI governance)
chat.swModerationHint: Monitor content and flag suspicious messages
chat.testHint: Try the assistant with current settings — the reply is composed by the governed level, injects knowledge, and is blocked if AI is off.
chat.testPlaceholder: Type a test message as a user...
chat.readOnlyNote: Read-only oversight view — you cannot intervene in the conversation.

reports.title: Insights & Reports
reports.subtitle: Recruitment funnel and cross-module KPIs + exportable reports

matching.title: Smart Matching & Screening
matching.subtitle: Ranked shortlists by candidate-opportunity fit — tunable weights, AI-boosted
matching.aiBoostNote: Boosts ranking when the candidate-matching capability is enabled in

pipeline.title: Hiring Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Track candidates through hiring stages on a kanban board — from applied to hired

archive.title: Archive & Data Lifecycle
archive.subtitle: Soft-deleted records across resources — restorable or permanently purgeable
archive.recoverNote: Deleting from resource screens archives here (restorable).
archive.purgeMsg: "{title}" will be permanently deleted with no recovery. Continue?

branding.title: Platform Customization & Branding
branding.subtitle: Set the platform name, logo, colors, theme and login text — with live preview wired to the theme engine
branding.previewNote: Live preview instantly recolors the console via the real theme engine.

health.title: System Health & Observability
health.subtitle: Live operational checks: database, cache, queue, broadcast, AI provider + recent errors

hub.title: Support & Assistant Hub
hub.subtitle: Unified command center: tickets & live support + chat oversight + AI assistant governance

assistant.title: Help Center
assistant.greeting: Hello{name}! I'm your AI assistant on the recruitment platform. I know your context and proactively help — how can I help today?
assistant.contextTitle: What the assistant knows about you
assistant.privacyOnNote: You turned off data sharing — the assistant gives general tips only.
assistant.quotaRemaining: {count} assistant tokens left {window} on your plan quota.
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Type your message to the assistant...
assistant.escalated: Escalated to human support — a ticket was created for you.
assistant.blockedHint: The assistant is unavailable now, but human support is ready to help.
assistant.supportEmpty: Pick a ticket from the list or open a new one to reach support.
assistant.prefDataTitle: Let the assistant use my data
assistant.prefDataHint: The assistant uses your own activity (applications/opportunities) for sharper advice — your data only.
assistant.prefProactiveHint: The assistant proactively surfaces nudges and opportunities based on your state.
assistant.privacyFooter: The assistant never sees other users' data — your privacy is protected per the platform model.
